tasks.instruction: Uzupełnij poniższe wypowiedzi (1.1.–1.6.), wybierając spośród podanych możliwości. Zakreśl literę A, B albo C.

items.prompt: That film was pure _______ — entertaining but with no real substance.
Stop crying over _______ milk. There's nothing you can do about it now.
She's the _______ of my eye — I couldn't be more proud of her.
The new manager is quite strict. She's not everyone's _______ of tea.
He had to eat humble _______ after admitting he was completely wrong.
The new contract was the _______ on the cake after an already brilliant year.
